---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new cleanup step or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: AbdulWaseaDev
---

## What would you like cleaned or improved?
A clear description of the feature you're requesting.

## Why is this useful?
Explain the use case — how much space does it typically waste, how common is it for developers?

## Suggested Approach (optional)
If you have an idea of how it could be implemented, share it here.

## Additional Context
Any links, screenshots, or references that might help.
